title: Electromagnetic Response Descriptor (ERD)
description: Non-normative, machine-consumable behavioral component datasheet for a RIS / reflectarray unit cell. Declares what the unit cell does at the Phase API boundary without exposing internal geometry, substrate stack-up, or bias-circuit details. Companion artifact to: R. D. Javor, 'Electromagnetic Response Descriptors, Spatial Validity Regions, and the Phase API: An Antenna-Domain Interface for Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces in 6G', ZeroPilot Corporation, 2026.

realized_phase_range.description: Achievable phase extent [min, max] in degrees. Declares the electromagnetic phase coverage the unit cell can produce at the Phase API boundary.

phase_quantization_resolution.description: State granularity in degrees. Determines quantization residual in the aperture synthesis layer. Use 0.0 for continuous (varactor-class) hardware.

amplitude_variation_dB.description: Peak-to-peak amplitude variation across phase states, in dB. Aperture efficiency loss predictor for the synthesis layer.

amplitude_phase_coupling_dB_per_rad.description: Amplitude-phase coupling in dB/rad. Quantifies command realization error; drives the runtime correction budget.

nearest_neighbor_coupling_dB.description: Nearest-neighbor inter-element coupling magnitude in dB (|S| magnitude). Declared at the Phase API boundary; not hidden in aperture synthesis.

operating_frequency_grid_GHz.description: Frequency grid in GHz over which ERD fields are declared. Core field; enables wideband beam-squint prediction. A scalar lookup table cannot express per-frequency beam pointing.

per_state_insertion_loss_dB.description: Per-state insertion loss in dB (one entry per discrete phase state for quantized hardware; single entry for continuous hardware). Per-state gain contribution to link budget.

phase_error_rms_deg.description: State-realization phase error, 1-sigma Gaussian, in degrees. Feeds EVM budget in the aperture synthesis and signal-processing layers.

amplitude_error_rms_dB.description: Amplitude realization error, 1-sigma, in dB. Feeds aperture efficiency calculation.

calibration_uncertainty_budget_deg.description: Residual implementation error after calibration, 1-sigma, in degrees. Performance confidence margin at the Phase API boundary.

temperature_drift_deg_per_C.description: Phase drift in degrees per degree C. Environmental stability declaration.

state_transition_timing_us.description: State-transition timing in microseconds. Controller scheduling constraint.

svr_core_angular_limits.description: Spatial Validity Region (SVR) — core zone: scalar or vector phase control is sufficient with ordinary runtime complexity. Incident and scattered angles within these limits can be managed with the declared ERD fields without higher-order corrections.

theta_incident_max_deg.description: Maximum incident elevation angle (degrees from boresight) for SVR core zone membership.

theta_scattered_max_deg.description: Maximum scattered elevation angle (degrees from boresight) for SVR core zone membership.

svr_marginal_angular_limits.description: Spatial Validity Region (SVR) — marginal zone: apply higher-order electromagnetic corrections and prepare predictive panel handoff. Outside these limits, reject or hand off.

theta_incident_max_deg.description: Maximum incident elevation angle (degrees from boresight) for SVR marginal zone membership.

theta_scattered_max_deg.description: Maximum scattered elevation angle (degrees from boresight) for SVR marginal zone membership.

wideband_squint_deg_per_GHz.description: Beam squint rate in degrees per GHz across the operating frequency grid. Enables wideband scheduling decisions without re-deriving aperture synthesis.

notes.description: Free-text notes on ERD scope, provenance, and population method.
